headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -19.8)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 101% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 147 quotes and 111 at strong intensity, driving the highest score today despite dropping from yesterday's peak.
• At 31.6, frustration levels remain well above the typical range but significantly cooler than yesterday's 69.3.
• Optimism bounced back strongly from yesterday's deep negative, while fears stayed relatively quiet with below-average activity.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
